items.name_en: YSL Calfskin WOC Small Envelope Bag. This is a must-have! Made from original factory grain calfskin, structured shape, comfortable to the touch. Removable shoulder strap allows it to be used as a clutch or evening bag. Multiple card slots, very practical. Take your phone and cards, and you're ready to go.

Model: S8091
Size: 19x11.5x4cm

【VOLTAIRE 】24 New Voltaire Mini Ellipse Shoulder Bag! Super chic minimalist design, showcasing the ultimate YSL French style and a very authentic vintage feel. Suitable for hand or shoulder carry. The front flap features a novel LE CASSANDRE turn-lock. The leather-lined bag with bronze hardware is simple and elegant. This is the simplest way to get one.
Item No.: S8098
Size: 21×11×4.5cm

items.name_en: 【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive 🔥 Black Lamb / Gold
items.name_cn:
【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive 🔥 Black Lamb / Gold
CALYPSO A simple yet elegant new YSL signature handbag! Rich French style. Bronze hardware turn-lock, one internal zip pocket. Made from fine-grain imported lambskin, quilted and padded, soft and spacious, ideal for daily use. The bag is simple, atmospheric, and slightly retro! A top choice for independent successful women 👍
Model: 777399【Original Leather】
Size: 37x21x10cm

items.name_en: YSL Monogram Caviar Envelope Bag. A super practical mini bag, the most classic style, upgraded to the highest version. 100% Italian calfskin with exquisite craftsmanship; custom metal YSL logo shows personality; flip-top design ensures security; small bag with large capacity, featuring 20 card slots, two bill compartments, two central compartments, and one zippered interior pocket. Model: S377828. Dimensions: 22x14x4cm
items.name_cn: YSL Monogram Caviar Envelope Bag. Model: S377828. Dimensions: 22x14x4cm

items.name_en: New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
items.name_cn:
New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
Very soft cowhide material, wear and scratch resistant~ Lightweight and versatile~ For those needing a commuter bag, this is a great choice~[Chuckle]
Simple body with no obvious large logo, a small logo on the leather pull tab is very exquisite~ Comes with a zip pocket inside for storage [Like]
Fits a 13-inch laptop, though it is a fashion bag, occasional laptop use is fine [Cute (Crocodile) Size 47x31x11, Model 600281
